dataController.label: Data Controller:
dataController.value: ARCADIA TECHNOLOGIES ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE DEVELOPING SERVICES - FZCO, trading as Arkadia Labs ("Arkadia", "we", "us", or "our")

body.p1: This Privacy Policy describes how Arkadia collects, uses, processes, and discloses your information when you access or use our website at arkadialabs.io, our AI-powered VoIP and automation services, and any other interactions you may have with us (collectively, the "Services").
body.p2: We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your data in an open and transparent manner in accordance with the EU General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — Regulation 2016/679), the UAE Federal Decree-Law No. 45 of 2021 on the Protection of Personal Data, and other applicable data protection laws.
body.p3: By accessing our Services, you acknowledge that you have read and understood this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with the practices described here, please do not use our Services.

body.h3a: A. Information You Provide to Us
body.p1: This includes data you voluntarily provide when you create an account, request a demo, subscribe to our services, contact our sales or support teams, or otherwise communicate with us. This may include:
body.li1: Full name, email address, phone number
body.li2: Company name, job title, business address
body.li4: Content of communications with our team
body.p2: When you navigate our website or use our Services, we may collect certain information automatically from your device, including:
body.li5: IP address and approximate geographic location
body.li6: Device type, browser type, and operating system
body.li7: Pages accessed, links clicked, and usage patterns
body.p3: We use tools such as Google Analytics 4 (GA4) for this purpose. See Section 9 (Cookies) for more details.
body.h3c: C. Information Processed on Behalf of Our Clients
body.p4: As a data processor, Arkadia processes personal data uploaded or generated by our clients through our platform, including contact lists, call metadata, and call recordings. This data is processed strictly in accordance with our clients's instructions and our Data Processing Agreement (DPA). This Privacy Policy does not govern data processed on behalf of clients — please refer to the relevant client's privacy policy for information about how they handle your data.

body.p1: Under the GDPR, we rely on the following legal bases to process your personal data:
body.r2c1: Responding to enquiries and providing support
body.r2c2: Performance of a contract / Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(b) / (f))
body.r3c2: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)) or Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)) for existing clients
body.p2: Where we rely on legitimate interest, we have conducted a balancing test to ensure that our interests do not override your fundamental rights and freedoms. You may request details of this assessment by contacting us at

body.p1: We use the information we collect to:
body.li1_strong: Provide, operate, and maintain our Services —
body.li1_text: set up and manage your account, process transactions, and deliver the services you request.
body.li2_strong: Improve, personalise, and develop our Services —
body.li2_text: understand how you use our Services and develop new features and functionality.
body.li3_text: send transactional messages, technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support messages. We may also send marketing communications in accordance with your preferences.
body.li4_text: detect and prevent fraudulent activities, abuse, and security threats.
body.li5_text: meet applicable tax, accounting, and regulatory requirements, and respond to lawful requests by public authorities.

body.p1: We do not sell your personal data. We may share your information with third parties only in the following circumstances:
body.p2: We work with third-party service providers who process data on our behalf, subject to contractual obligations that ensure appropriate data protection. Our current sub-processors include:
body.p3: We may disclose your information if required by applicable law, regulation, legal process, or governmental request.
body.p4: In connection with any merger, acquisition, sale of assets, or similar transaction, your information may be transferred as part of the business assets. We will notify you of any such change and the choices you may have regarding your data.

body.p1: Arkadia is established in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, which is not currently recognised by the European Commission as providing an adequate level of data protection. When we transfer personal data from the EU/EEA to the UAE or to other third countries, we rely on the following safeguards:
body.li1_text: as adopted by the European Commission under Implementing Decision (EU) 2021/914, incorporated into our Data Processing Agreements.
body.li2_text: for transfers to US-based providers certified under the Framework, as recognised by the European Commission Adequacy Decision of 10 July 2023.
body.li3_text: including encryption in transit and at rest, access controls, and contractual obligations on sub-processors, as recommended by the European Data Protection Board (EDPB).
body.p2: You may request a copy of the applicable transfer safeguards by contacting us at

body.p1: We retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfil the purposes described in this Privacy Policy, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by law. Our general retention periods are:
body.r2c3: UAE Commercial Companies Law / tax obligations
body.p2: Once data is no longer needed, it is securely deleted or anonymised. For data processed on behalf of our clients, retention is governed by the applicable Data Processing Agreement.

body.p1: If you are located in the EU/EEA, you have the following rights under the GDPR:
body.li1_text: obtain confirmation of whether your data is being processed and request a copy.
body.li2_text: request correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
body.li3_text: request deletion of your data where there is no compelling reason for continued processing.
body.li4_text: request that we limit how we process your data in certain circumstances.
body.li5_text: receive your data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format.
body.li6_text: object to processing based on legitimate interest or for direct marketing purposes.
body.li7_text: where processing is based on consent, withdraw it at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.
body.p2: To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at
body.p2b: or submit a request through our EU Representative's GDPR portal (see Section 11).
body.p3: We will respond to your request within 30 days. In complex cases, this period may be extended by an additional 60 days, and we will inform you of any such extension.
body.complaint_text: If you believe that our processing of your personal data infringes the GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority in the EU Member State of your habitual residence, place of work, or place of the alleged infringement. For Spain, this is the
body.complaint_aepd: Agencia Española de Protección de Datos (AEPD)
body.complaint_list: A list of all EU supervisory authorities is available at

body.p1: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to enhance your browsing experience and to analyse website traffic.
body.r2c2: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website
body.r3c2: Used to track visitors across websites for advertising purposes
body.p2: You can manage your cookie preferences through your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect the functionality of our website. For more information, please refer to our cookie banner when you first visit our website.

body.p1: Our Services are not directed at individuals under the age of 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you become aware that a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us at
body.p1b: and we will take steps to delete such information.

body.p1: As Arkadia is established outside the EU/EEA, we have appointed a representative in the European Union in accordance with Article 27 of the GDPR:
body.rep_address: Unit 3D North Point House, North Point Business Park, New Mallow Road, Cork, T23 AT2P, Ireland
body.rep_portal_text: To submit a Data Subject Access Request (DSAR), data deletion request, or any other GDPR-related enquiry, please use our secure portal:
body.rep_portal_note: Requests submitted through this portal are logged and tracked to ensure timely response and compliance.

body.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technologies, legal requirements, or other factors. When we make material changes, we will notify you by updating the "Last updated" date at the top of this page and, where appropriate, providing additional notice (such as an email notification or a prominent notice on our website).
body.p2: We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.

body.p1: If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us:
body.li3_text: ARCADIA TECHNOLOGIES ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE DEVELOPING SERVICES - FZCO, IFZA Business Park, Dubai Digital Park, Building A2, 342001, Nadd Hessa — Dubai Silicon Oasis, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
body.p2: For GDPR-specific enquiries, you may also contact our EU Representative directly (see Section 11).

body.p1: These Terms and Conditions constitute a legally binding agreement made between you, whether personally or on behalf of an entity ("you") and Arkadia Labs AG ("we," "us," or "our"), concerning your access to and use of our AI agent services and the arkadialabs.io website (collectively, the "Services").
body.p2: You agree that by accessing the Services, you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by all of these Terms and Conditions. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE WITH ALL OF THESE TERMS, THEN YOU ARE EXPRESSLY PROHIBITED FROM USING THE SERVICES AND YOU MUST DISCONTINUE USE IMMEDIATELY.
body.p3: Supplemental terms and conditions or documents that may be posted on the Website from time to time are hereby expressly incorporated herein by reference.

body.p1: Arkadia Labs provides custom-built, AI-powered agents designed to automate and optimize business processes, including but not limited to sales, marketing, operations, and customer support. The specific functionalities, scope, and performance metrics of each AI agent are defined in the specific service plan and setup agreement ("Service Plan") you subscribe to. The Service is provided on a subscription basis and may include a one-time setup fee.

To use certain features of the Service, you may be required to create an account. You are responsible for safeguarding your account password and for any activities or actions under your account. You agree to provide and maintain true, accurate, current, and complete information about yourself as prompted by the service's registration form.
body.p2: You are also responsible for providing the necessary data, access to third-party systems (e.g., CRMs), and strategic guidance required for us to build and maintain your AI agents as outlined in your Service Plan. You retain all ownership rights to your underlying data.

body.p1: You may not access or use the Services for any purpose other than that for which we make the Services available. The Services may not be used in connection with any commercial endeavors except those that are specifically endorsed or approved by us. As a user of the Services, you agree not to:
body.li1: Use the AI agents for any illegal, harmful, or fraudulent activities.
body.li2: Attempt to reverse-engineer, decompile, or otherwise discover the source code or underlying algorithms of the AI agents.
body.li3: Interfere with, disrupt, or create an undue burden on the Services or the networks or services connected to them.
body.li4: Use any data provided by the Service for purposes other than your internal business operations as intended by your Service Plan.

body.p1: We offer various subscription plans as detailed on our Pricing Page. You agree to pay all fees, including any applicable one-time setup fees, in accordance with the terms of your selected Service Plan. Subscription fees are billed on a recurring basis (e.g., monthly or annually) in advance. All payments are non-refundable except as expressly stated in your Service Plan. We reserve the right to change our prices and will notify you in advance of any such changes.

The Services, including the underlying AI models, software, algorithms, and all content on our Website (excluding your data), are the exclusive property of Arkadia Labs AG and its licensors. These are protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws of Switzerland and foreign countries. Our trademarks may not be used in connection with any product or service without our prior written consent. You retain full ownership of the data you provide to the Service.

We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to the Services immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever, including but not limited to a breach of these Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may do so by providing written notice in accordance with your Service Plan. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease.

The Services are provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis. You acknowledge that your use of the Services is at your sole risk and responsibility. To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, we disclaim all warranties, express or implied, in connection with the Services and your use thereof, including, without limitation, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
body.p2: We make no warranties or representations regarding the accuracy, completeness, timeliness, or usefulness of the content of the Services or any websites linked thereto. We shall not be liable for any (1) errors or omissions in any content and materials, (2) personal injury or property damage of any nature whatsoever resulting from your access to or use of the Services, or (3) any bugs, viruses, malware, or the like that may be transmitted to or through the Services by any third party. We do not guarantee any specific results from the use of our Services. Nothing herein shall affect any non-waivable statutory rights you may have or exclude or limit our liability where it would be unlawful to do so.

body.p1: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, in no event shall we, our directors, employees, or agents be liable to you or any third party for any direct, indirect, consequential, exemplary, incidental, special, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, revenue, data, or other damages arising from the use or inability to use the Services, even if we have been advised of the possibility of such damages.
body.p2: Notwithstanding anything to the contrary herein and except as otherwise required by law, our total liability to you for any cause whatsoever and regardless of the form of the action will at all times be limited to the amount actually paid, if any, by you to us during the six (6) month period preceding the event giving rise to the claim. Some jurisdictions do not allow the exclusion or limitation of certain warranties or damages, so some of the above limitations may not apply to you. Nothing in this clause shall exclude or limit our liability for fraud, gross negligence, personal injury or death caused by our negligence, or any other liability that cannot be excluded or limited under applicable law.

body.p1: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Switzerland, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights. If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid or unenforceable by a court, the remaining provisions of these Terms will remain in effect.

introduction.heading: What are cookies and other tracking technologies?

body.p1: A cookie is a small data file that is placed on your device when you visit a website. Cookies are widely used to make websites work, or to work more efficiently, as well as to provide reporting information.
body.p2: This notice also applies to similar tracking technologies, like web beacons (sometimes called "tracking pixels" or "clear gifs"). These are tiny graphics files that contain a unique identifier that enable us to recognize when someone has visited our Website. This allows us, for example, to monitor the traffic patterns of users from one page within our Website to another and to understand whether you have come to our Website from an online advertisement displayed on a third-party website.

body.p1: We use first-party and third-party cookies for several reasons. Some cookies are required for technical reasons in order for our Website to operate, and we refer to these as "essential" or "strictly necessary" cookies. Other cookies enable us to provide a better experience on our Website, and others are used for analytics and marketing purposes. This is described in more detail below.
Our website uses the following categories of cookies, managed through our consent management platform, Cookiebot:
body.p2: These cookies are strictly necessary to provide you with services available through our Website and to use some of its features, such as remembering your consent preferences. Because these cookies are strictly necessary to deliver the Website to you, you cannot refuse them without impacting how our site functions.
body.necessary_li2_text: To store your consent status for other cookie categories for the current domain.
body.p3: These cookies collect information that is used in aggregate form to help us understand how our Website is being used or how effective our marketing campaigns are. This data helps us understand traffic patterns, which pages are most and least popular, and how visitors move around the site.
body.stats_li2_text: To collect anonymous data on user behavior, such as page views, session duration, and user demographics, to help us understand and optimize our website's performance. All data collected is aggregated and does not personally identify you.
body.p4: These cookies are used to make advertising messages more relevant to you. They perform functions like preventing the same ad from continuously reappearing, ensuring ads are properly displayed, and in some cases, selecting advertisements based on your interests. We may use this data to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites.
body.marketing_li1_text: [List your marketing providers here, e.g., Meta (Facebook), LinkedIn, Google Ads]
body.marketing_li2_text: To track the effectiveness of marketing campaigns, enable targeted advertising, and understand user engagement with our marketing content.

body.p1: You have the right to decide whether to accept or reject cookies. You can exercise your cookie preferences at any time by clicking on the cookie settings link or banner provided by our consent management platform, Cookiebot. Through the banner, you can select which categories of cookies you accept or reject. Essential cookies cannot be rejected.
body.p2: In addition, you can set or amend your web browser controls to accept or refuse cookies. As the means by which you can refuse cookies through your web browser controls vary from browser-to-browser, you should visit your browser's help menu for more information.
body.p3_html: You can also opt out of targeted advertising by visiting industry portals such as the Digital Advertising Alliance (DAA) opt-out portal.

updates.heading: How often will we update this Cookie Notice?

body.p1: We may update this Cookie Notice from time to time in order to reflect, for example, changes to the cookies we use or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. Please therefore re-visit this Cookie Notice regularly to stay informed about our use of cookies and related technologies. The date at the top of this Cookie Notice indicates when it was last updated.

contact.heading: Where can I get further information?

body.p1_text: If you have any questions about our use of cookies or other technologies, please email us at
